description: Python pre-computed golden phonemes for byte-for-byte cross-runtime parity tests. Generated by piper_plus_g2p.MultilingualPhonemizer with default_latin_language threaded through the per-case language code, mirroring the C API's `defaultLatin` selection in piper.cpp around `UnicodeLanguageDetector(multiLangs, defaultLatin)`. Kotlin / Rust / Go / WASM / C# / C++ runtimes assert string equality against `expected_phonemes`.

Swedish retroflex assimilation — rn -> ɳ, long a (ɑː) before r+single C
